text.value: Illegal HTML: illegal html element: date1 ( et inférieure ou égale à ))
Illegal HTML: illegal html element: ins (Requête)
The html source has duplicate anchor Ids: _ftn1,_ftnref1
Illegal HTML: illegal html element: référence ()
The html source has duplicate anchor Ids: _ftn1,_ftnref1
The html source has duplicate anchor Ids: _ftn1,_ftnref1

No conformance term found in the text: 3.3.4). Le message est transmis avec un entête de type "EDXL-DE" (cf Enveloppe EDXL-DE) où distribution.kind est valorisé à Error, encapsulant le contenu du message json qui respecte le modèle suivant (cf. spécifications du Hub Santé
The HTML fragment 'ip-statements.xhtml' is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
An HTML fragment from the set [cross-version-analysis.xhtml, cross-version-analysis-inline.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
The HTML fragment 'globals-table.xhtml' is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide

A definition could not be found for Canonical URL 'http://fhir.org/packages/hl7.fhir.fr.core/ImplementationGuide/hl7.fhir.fr.core'
The string value contains text that looks like embedded HTML tags. If this content is rendered to HTML without appropriate post-processing, it may be a security risk

The ImplementationGuide uses package hl7.fhir.fr.core#2.1.0 released on 2024-09-04, but the most recent appropriate version is 2.2.0. This reference is getting old and the more recent version should be considered
The canonical URL http://fhir.org/packages/hl7.fhir.fr.core/ImplementationGuide/hl7.fhir.fr.core doesn't point to an actual ImplementationGuide resource

The packageId hl7.fhir.fr.core points to the canonical https://hl7.fr/ig/fhir/core which is inconsistent with the stated canonical of http://fhir.org/packages/hl7.fhir.fr.core/ImplementationGuide/hl7.fhir.fr.core

Wrong Display Name 'CPTS' for https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/TRE_R66-CategorieEtablissement/FHIR/TRE-R66-CategorieEtablissement#604. Valid display is one of 3 choices: 'Communauté Professionnelle Territoriale de Santé (CPTS)', 'C.P.T.S.' (null) or 'Communauté Professionnelle Territoriale de Santé (CPTS)' (null) (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code

Wrong Display Name 'MSP' for https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/TRE_R66-CategorieEtablissement/FHIR/TRE-R66-CategorieEtablissement#603. Valid display is one of 3 choices: 'Maison de santé (L.6223-3)', 'Maison de santé' (null) or 'Maison de santé (L6223-3)' (null) (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code

Wrong Display Name 'CDS' for https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/TRE_R66-CategorieEtablissement/FHIR/TRE-R66-CategorieEtablissement#124. Valid display is one of 3 choices: 'Centre de Santé', 'Centre de Santé' (null) or 'Centre de santé' (null) (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code

Wrong Display Name 'Créneau accessible par les professionnels de santé' for https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/TRE_R314-TypeCreneau/FHIR/TRE-R314-TypeCreneau#PRO. Valid display is one of 3 choices: 'Créneau accessible par l'ensemble des professionnels de santé', 'Créneau professionnel' (null) or 'Créneau de soins défini par un professionnel de santé ou son délégataire dans son logiciel de prise de RDV accessible à l'ensemble des PS' (null) (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code

Wrong Display Name 'Créneau accessible par les CPTS' for https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/TRE_R314-TypeCreneau/FHIR/TRE-R314-TypeCreneau#CPTS. Valid display is one of 3 choices: 'Créneau accessible par les communautés professionnelles territoriales de santé', 'Créneau de structure CPTS' (null) or 'Créneau de soins défini par un professionnel de santé ou son délégataire dans son logiciel de prise de RDV accessible par une structure de type CPTS' (null) (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code
Wrong Display Name 'FRANCE' for urn:iso:std:iso:3166#FR. Valid display is 'France (la)' (fr) (for the language(s) 'fr-FR')
